headline: Super vs ChatGPT — Personal AI Agents Compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: A fair, source‑driven comparison of Super and ChatGPT for people choosing a personal AI agent. ChatGPT is evolving toward agentic commerce and automation, while Super focuses on durable computer‑use workflows with a reusable computer‑use cache that lowers cost and friction over time.
